prestazioni: Engine: F133E 5.7L V12 (65° naturally aspirated) – Full titanium internals upgrade with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, JE forged pistons (12.5:1 compression), and a custom billet crankshaft by VAC Motorsports to handle 8,500 RPM redline reliably. Pair with a custom dry-sump system by Peterson Fluid Systems (4-stage) for consistent oil pressure under lateral G-forces.

Forced Induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA ball-bearing turbos (custom-mapped for the F133E’s 65° V12) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup by PWR (Australia) mounted in the front bumper, replacing the stock radiator support. Boost targets: 1.2 bar (17.5 psi) with a custom Motec M150 ECU managing fuel (ID1000x injectors) and ignition (MSD 8516 coils).

Exhaust: Full 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Capristo (Germany), featuring a 4-into-1-into-2 merge collector design with electronically controlled butterfly valves (operated via a custom CAN bus interface) and a secondary bypass for track use. Mufflers are replaced with straight-pipe sections for maximum flow, while the catalytic converters are retained (but upgraded to 200-cell metallic substrates by HJS).
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Rosso (Ferrari-specific kit for the 575 Superamerica), including extended front fenders (25mm per side), rear quarter panels (30mm per side), and a custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed from carbon fiber-reinforced nylon). The retractable hardtop is replaced with a fixed carbon fiber roof panel by Callaway Carbon (weight savings: 18kg).

Aerodynamics: Custom rear diffuser by APR Performance (USA), designed to work with the 575’s underbody airflow, featuring active Gurney flaps (adjustable via a cockpit switch). The rear spoiler is a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber unit (by 996TT) with a NACA duct for brake cooling, while the side skirts are replaced with vented carbon fiber pieces (by Vorsteiner) to reduce lift at high speeds.

Wheels & Stance: Forged 3-piece wheels by HRE (FF15 9.5x20 ET25 front, 12.5x20 ET35 rear) with custom center-lock adapters (by D9 Performance) to fit the 575’s hubs. Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/30 R20 front, 345/25 R20 rear). Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with remote reservoirs (custom valving for the 575’s geometry) and a full polybushings kit by SuperPro (replacing all OEM rubber bushings). Ride height lowered 30mm front, 25mm rear.
